name: Champion Technology Holdings Limited
summary: Champion Technology Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, primarily engages in the renewable energy projects, trading and transportation of gasoil, and oil tanker chartering businesses in the People's Republic of China, the United Kingdom, and Germany. The company operates through seven segments: Sales of Cultural Products, Systems Sales including Software Licensing and Services, Leasing of Systems Products, Renewable Energy, Trading for Gasoil and Others, Strategic Investments, and Shipping Business. It sells cultural products, systems, surveillance equipment, gasoil, and leather products and face masks; provides software licensing, and installation and maintenance services; leases system products; designs and sells renewable energy products and solutions; and charters vessels. The company also offers e-shopping and internet-based, as well as e-commerce and m-commerce services; invests in and leases properties; provides advertising and recruitment agency services; and trades in pagers, as well as telecommunication system and products. In addition, it provides documentation, and arrangement and business consultant services; messaging services; and consulting, research and development, and telecommunication services. Further, the company designs, manufactures, and distributes communication systems and equipment; offers money lending services; and provides engineering works. Champion Technology Holdings Limited is based in Hong Kong.
